title: Archaic-DNA processing pipeline: a modular archaeogenetics pipeline for detecting unexpected archaic introgression
description: A modular, validated Python pipeline that estimates Neanderthal and Denisovan ancestry in ancient Eurasian genomes (AADR) via allele-frequency f-statistics with block-jackknife errors, detects individuals whose archaic ancestry is unexpected given ancestry, geography and age, and is validated against published estimates, coalescent simulations with known ground truth, and ADMIXTOOLS 2. Includes a case study of Iron Age Etruscan genomes.
